title: lasianthus pedunculatus subsp. angustisepalus
intro: Lasianthus pedunculatus subsp. angustisepalus is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as a type of tea shrub. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasianthus pedunculatus subsp. angustisepalus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
